channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Lego’s Star Wars Day celebration starts early with new Mandalorian sets, double points for Insiders, and three gifts with purchase, including a free Darksaber build
item.description: Lego is celebrating May the 4th early, and turning it into a weekend event, with double points for Insider members, new sets, and some especially nice sets that land as a free gift with purchase.
